label: Contrastive and mutual-information objectives

node.label: Contrastive and mutual-information objectives
node.definition: Paired views or examples define similarity signals that shape a representation space.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Contrastive and mutual-information objectives is modeled as depending on Contrastive learning, Information theory and feeding downstream nodes such as Multimodal foundation models, Dense vector retrieval.
examples: atlas downstream link to Multimodal foundation models
atlas downstream link to Dense vector retrieval
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Contrastive learning, Information theory.
